pull.title: [Benchmark] use flashinfer bench_gpu_time instead of triton do_bench
pull.body:
**Note:** Due to the number of modifications, this work is split into 2 PRs. This is PR 1 (benchmark/ folder only).

**Related Issue:** #20212

## Motivation

Replace `triton.testing.do_bench` / `do_bench_cudagraph` with `flashinfer.testing.bench_gpu_time` in benchmark scripts for more accurate GPU kernel timing (see [b8zhong's issue](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues) and [FlashInfer docs](https://docs.flashinfer.ai/generated/flashinfer.testing.bench_gpu_time.html)).

## Modifications

- Add `sglang.benchmark.bench_utils.run_bench` wrapper around `flashinfer.testing.bench_gpu_time`
- Replace `do_bench` / `do_bench_cudagraph` in 12 files under `benchmark/kernels/`:
  - `quantization/`: `bench_int8_quant.py`, `bench_fp4_quant.py`
  - `scheduler_batch/`: `benchmark_write_req_to_token_pool_triton.py`, `benchmark_get_last_loc_triton.py`
  - `sliding_window_attention_triton/`: `bench_triton_swa_kernel.py`
  - `fused_moe_triton/`: `benchmark_sglang_fused_moe_triton.py`, `benchmark_vllm_vs_sglang_fused_moe_triton.py`, `benchmark_torch_compile_fused_moe.py`
  - `elementwise/`: `benchmark_concat_mla.py`
  - `deepseek/`: `benchmark_deepgemm_fp8_gemm.py`, `benchmark_deepgemm_fp8_gemm_blackwell.py`, `benchmark_deepgemm_fp8_group_gemm.py`

## Accuracy Tests

N/A — timing-only changes; model outputs unchanged.

## Benchmarking and Profiling

**`run_bench` smoke test (Colab, A100):**

```
/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/flashinfer/testing/utils.py:1633: UserWarning: cold_l2_cache=True but no GPU tensors found in input_args/input_kwargs. Cold L2 benchmarking disabled.
  return bench_gpu_time_with_cudagraph(
OK: median=0.0272ms
```

sgl_kernel-dependent benchmarks (e.g. `bench_int8_quant`, `bench_fp4_quant`, `benchmark_concat_mla`, fused_moe) could not be run due to cluster allocation. These will be tested once cluster access is available.

## Checklist

- [ ] Format your code according to the [Format code with pre-commit](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#format-code-with-pre-commit).
- [ ] Add unit tests according to the [Run and add unit tests](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#run-and-add-unit-tests).
- [ ] Update documentation according to [Write documentations](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#write-documentations).
- [ ] Provide accuracy and speed benchmark results according to [Test the accuracy](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#test-the-accuracy) and [Benchmark the speed](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#benchmark-the-speed).
- [ ] Follow the SGLang code style [guidance](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#code-style-guidance).

## Review Process

1. Ping Merge Oncalls to start the PR flow. See the [PR Merge Process](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/blob/main/.github/MAINTAINER.md#pull-request-merge-process).
2. Get approvals from [CODEOWNERS](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/blob/main/.github/CODEOWNERS) and other reviewers.
3. Trigger CI tests with [comments](https://docs.sglang.io/developer_guide/contribution_guide.html#how-to-trigger-ci-tests) or contact authorized users to do so.
   - `/tag-run-ci-label`, `/rerun-failed-ci`, `/tag-and-rerun-ci`
4. After green CI and required approvals, ask Merge Oncalls to merge.

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+"""Triton do_bench/do_bench_cudagraph compatible wrapper using flashinfer.testing.bench_gpu_time."""
+
+import numpy as np
+from flashinfer.testing import bench_gpu_time
+
+
+def run_bench(
+    fn,
+    use_cuda_graph: bool = True,
+    quantiles=(0.5, 0.2, 0.8),
+    warmup_ms: int = 25,
+    rep_ms: int = 100,
+):
+    """Returns (ms, min_ms, max_ms) or (median,) when quantiles=None."""
+    times = bench_gpu_time(
+        fn=fn,
+        use_cuda_graph=use_cuda_graph,
+        dry_run_time_ms=warmup_ms,
+        repeat_time_ms=rep_ms,
+    )
+    if quantiles is None:
+        return (float(np.median(times)),)
+    return tuple(float(np.percentile(times, q * 100)) for q in quantiles)
